message:
fix(tasks): allow Pending -> Failed state transition

Previously calling fail_task() on a pending task was silently ignored,
leaving the task stuck in Pending state. Now it properly records the
failure: sets status to Failed, stores the error message, sets
completed_at, and produces a result with success: false.

Update can_transition validation and rename test from
fail_task_on_pending_is_ignored to fail_task_on_pending_records_failure
to reflect the corrected behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
